author: y4rr
content: Plan: Phase B.2 adds ferrotorch-whisper crate as the 24th workspace member, mirroring Phase B.1 (ferrotorch-bert) and Phase A (vision). Encoder-only scope. Audio preprocessing (log-mel spectrogram) using ferrotorch-core FFT primitives + pre-computed 80-mel filter bank (matching Whisper's whisper/assets/mel_filters.npz). Whisper encoder = 2x Conv1d stem (80->384, 384->384) + GELU, sinusoidal positional embedding, 4 pre-norm transformer layers (6-head MHSA, FFN with GELU 384->1536->384), final LayerNorm. PASS bar: cosine_sim>=0.999, max_abs<=0.5 on encoder output [1,1500,384]. Will reuse the DropReport pattern from BertModel for HF state-dict ingest. Three new pieces of evidence: pin script, verify harness, cargo test wrapper. Auto-CHANGELOG only.
